description_long: This is a modern swivel chair with a plush, contoured seat and backrest upholstered in a dark, velvety fabric. The seat and back feature a smooth, slightly mottled texture with gentle curves that provide ergonomic support. The chair's exterior shell is covered in a textured, leather-like material, contrasting with the softer inner surfaces. It is supported by a minimalist, four-legged metal base with a matte black finish, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The armrests are integrated into the seat, curving outward for comfort and style. There are no visible adjustment mechanisms or casters, and the chair is designed for stationary use in urban interiors such as offices, lounges, or waiting areas.
description: A modern swivel chair with a plush, contoured seat and backrest in dark velvet, set on a sleek black metal base. The chair features integrated armrests and a contrasting textured exterior shell.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, curved seat and backrest with integrated armrests and plush velvet upholstery.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the ergonomic contouring of the seat and back, as well as the textured exterior shell and the angled metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, continuous leather-like shell and the four-legged metal base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the seat's depth, the curvature of the backrest, and the seamless transition between materials.
attribute_central_support_column: none; the chair is supported by four angled metal legs without a central column.
attribute_seat_back_design: Wide, gently curved backrest with integrated side wings, upholstered in dark velvet fabric, providing ergonomic support and a plush appearance.
attribute_armrest_style: Integrated armrests formed by the outward curve of the seat and backrest, upholstered in the same fabric as the seat, with no separate attachment.
